steps.title: Use the long delay
steps.content: The conjecture was posed in the first century BCE, but the first valid proof did not appear until 1999. For all that time, a conclusive demonstration resisted mathematicians' efforts.

steps.title: Reject mismatched verbs
steps.content: B means foreshadowed, C means perfectly represented, and D means replaced. None describes a proof remaining out of reach despite repeated attempts across centuries. The answer is A.
